TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tnsapah_mu, title = Tnsapah_mu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tnsapah_mu} }

S.FORM: = Tnsapah mu = Ruwan sapah mu o niqan nami mspac hiyi. Niqan tama rudan mi bubu rudan,tama mi bubu, dha qbsuran mu sana mi kingal swayi qrijil tgska ka raku. Msuupu nami kjiyax emblaiq mami balay.
S.PHON: = tnsapaħ mu = ɾuwan sapaħ mu o niqan nami mspaʦ ħiji. niqan tama ɾudan mi bubu ɾudan,tama mi bubu, dħa qbsuɾan mu sana mi kiŋal swaji qɾiɟil tgska ka ɾaku. msuupu nami kɟijax əmblaiq mami balaj.
S.FORM: = Tnsapah mu = Ruwan sapah mu o niqan nami mspac hiyi. Niqan tama rudan mi bubu rudan,tama mi bubu, dha qbsuran mu sana mi kingal swayi qrijil tgska ka raku. Msuupu nami kjiyax emblaiq mami balay.
S.PHON: = tnsapaħ mu = ɾuwan sapaħ mu o niqan nami mspaʦ ħiji. niqan tama ɾudan mi bubu ɾudan,tama mi bubu, dħa qbsuɾan mu sana mi kiŋal swaji qɾiɟil tgska ka ɾaku. msuupu nami kɟijax əmblaiq mami balaj.
